name: Material Polyline
summary: A Cesium material polyline effect for Mars3D-style solid, outline, arrow, dash, animated texture, cross, and navigation route lines.
useCases: Custom texture lines for business-specific route symbols
Command, patrol, warning, navigation, and data-flow paths

positions.description: WGS84 route points. Each point supports longitude, latitude, and optional height.

style.description: Polyline material style. Native Cesium styles are solid, outline, arrow, dash, and dual-dash. Dynamic material styles are flow, flow-color, three-dash, cross, and navigation.

color.description: Primary CSS color for the line material.

secondaryColor.description: Secondary CSS color used by outline, dual-dash, and dynamic accent branches.

backgroundColor.description: Background or low-alpha color used by dynamic material branches.

outlineWidth.description: Outline width for the outline style.

speed.description: Animation speed multiplier for dynamic texture and procedural styles.

repeat.description: Texture repeat count. x controls repetition along the route and y controls vertical texture repetition.

imagePreset.description: Built-in image texture preset for dynamic material styles.

image.description: Optional custom image material. Supports URL strings, data URLs, HTMLImageElement, HTMLCanvasElement, ImageBitmap, and OffscreenCanvas. When image is provided, it takes priority over imagePreset.

arcHeight.description: Optional raised-arc peak height in meters. 0 renders a normal route polyline.

arcSamples.description: Sample count used when arcHeight is greater than 0.

cornerRadius.description: Corner rounding strength for route bends. 0 keeps sharp corners.

clampToGround.description: Clamp route polylines to terrain when arcHeight is 0.

visible.description: Initial visibility for the effect data source.

minimal.code:
import { createMaterialPolylineEffect } from '@ztgkzhaohao/geo-effect-kit'

const materialLine = createMaterialPolylineEffect(viewer, {
  positions: [
    { longitude: 116.285, latitude: 39.87 },
    { longitude: 116.394, latitude: 39.91 },
    { longitude: 116.505, latitude: 39.9 },
  ],
  style: 'navigation',
  color: '#33f7ff',
  secondaryColor: '#ffffff',
  backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 64, 255, 0.35)',
  width: 10,
  speed: 1.2,
  repeat: { x: 4, y: 1 },
  image: 'https://example.com/textures/navigation-line.png',
  cornerRadius: 0.14,
})

materialLine.flyTo()
materialLine.destroy()

preset.code:
const materialLine = createMaterialPolylineEffect(viewer, {
  positions,
  style: 'flow',
  imagePreset: 'pulse',
  color: '#33f7ff',
  speed: 1,
  width: 8,
})

update.code:
materialLine.update({
  style: 'cross',
  image: canvasTexture,
  color: '#adff7d',
  secondaryColor: '#ffffff',
  speed: 2,
  repeat: { x: 6, y: 1 },
})

notes: Pass an existing Cesium Viewer; the SDK does not create or own the viewer.
Static styles use Cesium native material properties; dynamic texture and procedural styles use a custom MaterialProperty.
image takes priority over imagePreset and can be a URL, data URL, image element, canvas, ImageBitmap, or OffscreenCanvas.
Changing positions, arcHeight, arcSamples, cornerRadius, or clampToGround rebuilds the route entity; colors, speed, repeat, and image update live.
Call destroy() during page cleanup to remove the data source and render loop.
